instructions:
Task 2.7: Extend Terminal Detector for macOS auto-registration.

YOU MUST USE file_write() TOOL CALLS. Format:
file_write("path/to/file", """content with actual newlines
not escaped \n characters""")

CRITICAL: Use actual newlines in file content, NOT escaped \n

Create these files:

1. internal/terminal/detector.go - Modify to support adapters
   - Add adapters []TerminalAdapter field to Detector struct
   - Modify NewDetector() to accept optional adapters
   - Add GetAdapterStatus() method returning []AdapterStatus
   - Add AddAdapter() method
   - Keep existing Start/Stop/Events/GetSessions methods

2. internal/terminal/detector_test.go - Tests for detector
   - Test NewDetector, Start/Stop, GetAdapterStatus, AddAdapter
   - Use mock adapter for testing

3. internal/adapters/factory.go - Auto-registration (//go:build !darwin)
   - NewDetectorWithAutoAdapters() - creates detector with tmux adapter
   - RequestAccessibilityPermission() - returns false
   - IsAccessibilityEnabled() - returns false

4. internal/adapters/factory_darwin.go - Auto-registration (//go:build darwin)
   - NewDetectorWithAutoAdapters() - creates detector with tmux + macos adapters
   - RequestAccessibilityPermission() - calls macos.RequestAccessibilityPermission()
   - IsAccessibilityEnabled() - calls macos.IsAccessibilityEnabled()

Read spec at docs/tasks/2.7-spec.md for details.
escalation_from: L0-Coder (tools executed but file content had escaped newlines)
